steps.title: Use the combining clue
steps.content: The passage says the Al Noor Mosque combines Persian, Mughal, and Moorish elements. The blank must name the result of bringing multiple architectural influences together into one design.

steps.title: Match the blend
steps.content: Choice B means rejection, Choice C means critical analysis, and Choice D means reducing complexity. None fits a mosque that combines several styles. Fusion means a blending of distinct elements into a whole. The answer is A.
